requirements.type: rank | attribute | trait | edge | wild_card | arcane_background | hindrance_any_of | special

effects.type: modifier | resource | reroll | restriction | grant | damage | action | status | special
effects.operator: add | subtract | set | ignore | grant | reroll | draw | recover | replace | remove | double | halve | fail | break
effects.details: human-readable clarification

entries.name: Alertness
entries.summary: The hero is exceptionally observant.

effects.details: +2 to Notice rolls.

entries.name: Ambidextrous
entries.summary: The hero uses either hand equally well.

effects.details: Ignore the usual −2 off-hand penalty.

notes: If wielding two weapons, Parry bonuses from both can stack.

entries.name: Arcane Background
entries.summary: Grants access to an arcane tradition.

effects.details: Allows the character to take one of the Arcane Backgrounds from Chapter Five.

entries.name: Arcane Resistance
entries.summary: The hero resists supernatural powers.

effects.details: Enemy arcane skill rolls targeting the hero suffer −2.
Magical damage dealt to the hero is reduced by 2.

notes: Applies against magical bonuses on weapons and similar supernatural effects.

entries.name: Improved Arcane Resistance
entries.summary: A stronger version of Arcane Resistance.

effects.details: Enemy arcane skill rolls targeting the hero suffer −4.
Magical damage dealt to the hero is reduced by 4.

entries.name: Aristocrat
entries.summary: The hero moves comfortably among the elite.

effects.details: +2 to Persuasion when Networking with elites, nobles, or similar figures.
+2 to Common Knowledge rolls about upper-class etiquette, heraldry, family lines, or gossip.

entries.name: Attractive
entries.summary: The hero gains social leverage through appearance.

effects.details: +1 to Performance rolls against interested targets.
+1 to Persuasion rolls against interested targets.

entries.name: Very Attractive
entries.summary: A stronger version of Attractive.

effects.details: +2 to Performance rolls against interested targets.
+2 to Persuasion rolls against interested targets.

entries.name: Berserk
entries.summary: Physical harm can send the hero into a deadly rage.

effects.details: The hero goes Berserk after suffering physical harm if the Smarts roll fails.
Strength increases one die type while Berserk.
+2 Toughness while Berserk.
Ignore one level of Wound penalties while Berserk.
All melee attacks must be Wild Attacks while Berserk.

notes: Critical failures on Fighting hit a random target while Berserk.
After five consecutive rounds the hero takes Fatigue; after ten rounds rage ends.
The hero can attempt to end the rage with a Smarts roll at −2.

entries.name: Brave
entries.summary: The hero handles terror better than most.

effects.details: +2 to Fear checks.
Subtract 2 from rolls on the Fear Table.

entries.name: Brawny
entries.summary: The hero is exceptionally large or fit.

effects.details: Size increases by +1, which also increases Toughness by 1.
Treat Strength as one die type higher for Encumbrance and Minimum Strength requirements.

notes: Brawny cannot increase Size above +3.

entries.name: Brute
entries.summary: The hero relies on strength instead of coordination for Athletics.

effects.details: Athletics is linked to Strength instead of Agility, including resisting Athletics if the hero chooses.
Increase Short Range of thrown items by +1, with Medium and Long recalculated from the new Short Range.

entries.name: Charismatic
entries.summary: The hero is naturally persuasive.

effects.details: Gain one free reroll on Persuasion rolls.

entries.name: Elan
entries.summary: The hero gets more out of Benny-powered rerolls.

effects.details: +2 when spending a Benny to reroll a Trait roll.

entries.name: Fame
entries.summary: The hero is a minor celebrity.

effects.details: +1 to Persuasion when the hero is recognized.
Earn double the usual fee for Performance.

entries.name: Famous
entries.summary: The hero is widely known and paid accordingly.

effects.details: +2 to Persuasion when the hero is recognized.
Earn five times or more the usual fee for Performance.

entries.name: Fast Healer
entries.summary: The hero recovers naturally more effectively.

effects.details: +2 to Vigor rolls for natural healing.

notes: Natural healing checks are made every 3 days.

entries.name: Fleet-Footed
entries.summary: The hero moves faster than normal.

effects.details: +2 Pace.
Increase the running die one step.

entries.name: Linguist
entries.summary: The hero begins play with several languages.

effects.details: Start with a number of Language skills at d6 equal to half the hero’s Smarts die type.

entries.name: Luck
entries.summary: The hero starts each session with more Bennies.

effects.details: Gain one extra Benny at the start of each session.

entries.name: Great Luck
entries.summary: The hero starts each session with even more Bennies.

effects.details: Gain two extra Bennies at the start of each session.

entries.name: Quick
entries.summary: The hero reacts faster than normal in combat.

effects.details: The hero may discard and redraw Action Cards of 5 or lower.

entries.name: Rich
entries.summary: The hero starts wealthier than most.

effects.details: Start with three times the normal starting funds.
Average annual salary is $150,000.

entries.name: Filthy Rich
entries.summary: The hero is extremely wealthy.

effects.details: Start with five times the normal starting funds.
Average annual salary is $500,000.

entries.name: Block
entries.summary: The hero is harder to hit in melee.

effects.details: +1 Parry.
Ignore 1 point of Gang Up bonus from foes.

entries.name: Improved Block
entries.summary: A stronger version of Block.

effects.details: +2 Parry.
Ignore 2 points of Gang Up bonus from foes.

entries.name: Brawler
entries.summary: The hero is tougher and deadlier unarmed.

effects.details: +1 Toughness.
Add a d4 to unarmed damage, or increase an existing bonus die one step if combined with Martial Artist, Claws, or similar abilities.

entries.name: Bruiser
entries.summary: The hero becomes even tougher and more dangerous unarmed.

effects.details: Increase unarmed Strength damage one die type.
Gain another +1 Toughness.

entries.name: Calculating
entries.summary: The hero makes a low card count.

effects.details: Ignore up to 2 points of penalties on one action when holding an Action Card of 5 or lower.

entries.name: Combat Reflexes
entries.summary: The hero recovers from stun and shock more easily.

effects.details: +2 Spirit when recovering from being Shaken or Stunned.

entries.name: Counterattack
entries.summary: The hero punishes missed melee attacks.

effects.details: Gain one free attack against a foe who misses with a Fighting roll.

entries.name: Improved Counterattack
entries.summary: The hero can counter multiple missed melee attacks.

effects.details: Gain free counterattacks against up to three failed attacks per turn.

entries.name: Dead Shot
entries.summary: A Joker can turn the first ranged hit into devastating damage.

effects.details: On a Joker, the first successful Athletics (throwing) or Shooting roll deals double damage.

entries.name: Dodge
entries.summary: The hero is harder to hit at range.

effects.details: Foes suffer −2 to hit the hero with ranged attacks.

entries.name: Improved Dodge
entries.summary: The hero is also much better at Evasion.

effects.details: +2 to Evasion totals.

entries.name: Double Tap
entries.summary: The hero puts two shots on target more effectively.

effects.details: +1 to hit when firing no more than RoF 1.
+1 damage when firing no more than RoF 1.

entries.name: Extraction
entries.summary: The hero can slip away from one adjacent foe safely.

effects.details: One adjacent foe does not get a free attack when the hero withdraws from close combat.

entries.name: Improved Extraction
entries.summary: The hero can disengage from several nearby foes.

effects.details: Up to three adjacent foes do not get free attacks when the hero withdraws.

entries.name: Feint
entries.summary: The hero can force a less agile defense during a Fighting Test.

effects.details: The hero may choose to have a foe resist a Fighting Test with Smarts instead of Agility.

entries.name: First Strike
entries.summary: The hero lashes out when enemies move into reach.

effects.details: Gain one free Fighting attack when a foe moves within Reach.

entries.name: Improved First Strike
entries.summary: The hero can exploit multiple openings when foes close in.

effects.details: Gain free Fighting attacks against up to three foes when they move within Reach.

entries.name: Free Runner
entries.summary: The hero moves through obstacles and chases efficiently.

effects.details: Ignore Difficult Ground.
+2 to Athletics in foot chases and when climbing.

entries.name: Frenzy
entries.summary: The hero can unleash multiple melee strikes at once.

effects.details: Roll a second Fighting die for one melee attack.

entries.name: Improved Frenzy
entries.summary: The hero can press an even more furious melee assault.

effects.details: Roll a third Fighting die for one melee attack.

entries.name: Giant Killer
entries.summary: The hero hits far above their size class.

effects.details: +1d6 damage against creatures three Sizes larger or more.

entries.name: Hard to Kill
entries.summary: The hero resists dying from severe wounds.

effects.details: Ignore Wound penalties when making Vigor rolls to avoid Bleeding Out.

entries.name: Harder to Kill
entries.summary: The hero can survive apparent death.

effects.details: If the character perishes, roll a die; on an even result the hero is Incapacitated instead and survives somehow.

entries.name: Improvisational Fighter
entries.summary: The hero makes the best of improvised weapons.

effects.details: Ignore the usual −2 penalty when attacking with improvised weapons.

entries.name: Iron Jaw
entries.summary: The hero is very hard to knock cold.

effects.details: +2 to Soak rolls.
+2 to Vigor rolls made to avoid Knockout Blows.

entries.name: Killer Instinct
entries.summary: The hero excels at pressing an advantage in Tests.

effects.details: Gain a free reroll on any opposed Test the hero initiates.

entries.name: Level Headed
entries.summary: The hero reads the fight quickly and acts on the better card.

effects.details: Draw one additional Action Card each round and choose which one to use.

entries.name: Improved Level Headed
entries.summary: The hero evaluates several options at once in combat.

effects.details: Draw two additional Action Cards each round and choose which one to use.

entries.name: Marksman
entries.summary: The hero makes a deliberate, high-quality ranged shot.

effects.details: Ignore up to 2 points of penalties from Range, Cover, Called Shot, Scale, or Speed.
Alternatively, add +1 to the first Athletics (throwing) or Shooting roll.

entries.name: Martial Artist
entries.summary: The hero is trained to make unarmed combat more effective.

effects.details: +1 to Unarmed Fighting.
Fists and feet count as Natural Weapons.
Add a d4 to unarmed damage, or increase the bonus die one step if the hero already has one.

entries.name: Martial Warrior
entries.summary: The hero is an even more formidable unarmed combatant.

effects.details: +2 to Unarmed Fighting.
Increase the unarmed damage bonus die one step.

entries.name: Mighty Blow
entries.summary: A Joker can turn the first melee hit into devastating damage.

effects.details: On a Joker, the first successful Fighting roll deals double damage.

entries.name: Nerves of Steel
entries.summary: The hero shrugs off pain more effectively.

effects.details: Ignore one level of Wound penalties.

entries.name: Improved Nerves of Steel
entries.summary: The hero operates well even while badly hurt.

effects.details: Ignore up to two levels of Wound penalties.

entries.name: No Mercy
entries.summary: The hero hits harder when spending a Benny on damage.

effects.details: +2 damage when spending a Benny to reroll damage.

entries.name: Rapid Fire
entries.summary: The hero can pour out more bullets in one attack.

effects.details: Increase RoF by 1 for one Shooting attack per turn.

entries.name: Improved Rapid Fire
entries.summary: The hero can increase rate of fire on multiple attacks.

effects.details: Increase RoF by 1 for up to two Shooting attacks per turn.

entries.name: Rock and Roll!
entries.summary: The hero controls automatic weapons expertly when braced.

effects.details: Ignore Recoil when firing weapons with RoF 2 or more, as long as the character does not move.

entries.name: Steady Hands
entries.summary: The hero remains accurate on unstable footing.

effects.details: Ignore the Unstable Platform penalty.
Reduce the running penalty to −1.

entries.name: Sweep
entries.summary: The hero can strike every foe in reach with one attack.

effects.details: Make one Fighting roll to hit all targets in the weapon’s Reach.

entries.name: Improved Sweep
entries.summary: The hero can Sweep without striking allies.

effects.details: Sweep attacks can avoid allies.

entries.name: Trademark Weapon
entries.summary: The hero is especially effective with one signature weapon.

effects.details: +1 to Athletics (throwing), Fighting, or Shooting totals with one chosen weapon.
+1 Parry while the chosen weapon is readied.

entries.name: Improved Trademark Weapon
entries.summary: The hero’s signature weapon bonus improves further.

effects.details: +2 to Athletics (throwing), Fighting, or Shooting totals with the chosen weapon.
+2 Parry while the chosen weapon is readied.

entries.name: Two-Fisted
entries.summary: The hero can attack with two melee weapons more efficiently.

effects.details: Make one extra Fighting roll with a second melee weapon in the off-hand without the usual Multi-Action penalty.

entries.name: Two-Gun Kid
entries.summary: The hero can fire or throw with two ranged weapons more efficiently.

effects.details: Make one extra Shooting roll, or Athletics (throwing) roll, with a second ranged weapon in the off-hand without the usual Multi-Action penalty.

entries.name: Command
entries.summary: The hero improves recovery for allied Extras nearby.

effects.details: Extras in Command Range add +1 to Spirit rolls to recover from Shaken and Vigor rolls to recover from Stunned.

notes: Command Range is 5 inches or 10 yards unless modified.

entries.name: Command Presence
entries.summary: The hero can direct allies from farther away.

effects.details: Increase Command Range to 10 inches or 20 yards.

entries.name: Fervor
entries.summary: The hero inspires allied Extras to hit harder.

effects.details: Extras in Command Range add +1 to Fighting damage rolls.

entries.name: Hold the Line
entries.summary: The hero stiffens allied defenses.

effects.details: Extras in Command Range gain +1 Toughness.

entries.name: Inspire
entries.summary: The hero can Support a whole group at once with Battle.

effects.details: Make a Battle roll to Support one type of Trait roll and apply it to Extras in Command Range.

entries.name: Natural Leader
entries.summary: The hero’s leadership works on allied Wild Cards too.

effects.details: Leadership Edges now apply to allied Wild Cards.

entries.name: Tactician
entries.summary: The hero can improve allied timing with extra Action Cards.

effects.details: Draw one extra Action Card each turn that may be assigned to an allied Extra or group of Extras in Command Range.

entries.name: Master Tactician
entries.summary: The hero can assign even more extra Action Cards.

effects.details: Draw and distribute two extra Action Cards each turn.

entries.name: Artificer
entries.summary: The hero can create Arcane Devices.

effects.details: Allows the character to create Arcane Devices.

entries.name: Channeling
entries.summary: The hero channels power more efficiently on a raise.

effects.details: Reduce Power Point cost by 1 on a raise. This can reduce the cost to 0.

entries.name: Concentration
entries.summary: The hero can sustain powers for longer.

effects.details: Double the base Duration of any non-Instant power, including when maintaining it.

entries.name: Extra Effort
entries.summary: Gifted heroes can temporarily push Focus higher.

effects.details: Increase Focus by +1 for 1 Power Point or +2 for 3 Power Points.

entries.name: Gadgeteer
entries.summary: Weird scientists can improvise devices that mimic powers.

effects.details: Spend 3 Power Points to create a device that replicates another power.

entries.name: Holy/Unholy Warrior
entries.summary: Miracle workers can spend Power Points to bolster Soak rolls.

effects.details: Add +1 to +4 to a final Soak roll, one point per Power Point spent.

entries.name: Mentalist
entries.summary: Psionic heroes dominate opposed mental struggles.

effects.details: +2 to opposed Psionics rolls, whether attacking or defending.

entries.name: New Powers
entries.summary: The hero expands their arcane repertoire.

effects.details: Learn two new powers, or add a new Trapping to an existing power.

notes: This Edge may be taken multiple times.

entries.name: Power Points
entries.summary: The hero gains a larger Power Point pool.

effects.details: Gain 5 additional Power Points.

notes: At Legendary Rank, this Edge may be taken as often as desired, but each later purchase grants only 2 Power Points.

entries.name: Power Surge
entries.summary: A Joker restores the hero’s Power Points.

effects.details: Recover 10 Power Points on a Joker, up to the usual maximum.

entries.name: Rapid Recharge
entries.summary: The hero recovers Power Points faster while resting.

effects.details: Recover 10 Power Points per hour of rest.

entries.name: Improved Rapid Recharge
entries.summary: The hero recharges Power Points even faster.

effects.details: Recover 20 Power Points per hour of rest.

entries.name: Soul Drain
entries.summary: The hero can trade Fatigue for Power Points.

effects.details: Recover 5 Power Points for each level of Fatigue taken, up to 10 total.

notes: Fatigue from Soul Drain recovers only naturally and cannot render the hero Incapacitated.

entries.name: Wizard
entries.summary: The hero can change a spell’s Trapping on the fly.

effects.details: Spend 1 extra Power Point to change a spell’s Trapping.

entries.name: Ace
entries.summary: The hero excels at operating and protecting vehicles.

effects.details: Ignore up to 2 points of penalties on Boating, Driving, or Piloting rolls.
May spend Bennies to Soak damage for a vehicle under the hero’s control or command using Boating, Driving, or Piloting.

entries.name: Acrobat
entries.summary: The hero can retry acrobatic athletic maneuvers more reliably.

effects.details: Gain one free reroll on Athletics totals involving balance, tumbling, or grappling.

notes: Does not affect interrupts, climbing, swimming, or throwing.

entries.name: Combat Acrobat
entries.summary: The hero is harder to hit while moving freely in a fight.

effects.details: Ranged and melee attacks against the hero are made at −1.

entries.name: Assassin
entries.summary: The hero is especially lethal against exposed targets.

effects.details: +2 damage against foes who are Vulnerable or when the hero has The Drop.

entries.name: Investigator
entries.summary: The hero excels at research and detailed searches.

effects.details: +2 to Research rolls.
+2 to certain Notice rolls used to search for important clues or obscured items.

entries.name: Jack-of-All-Trades
entries.summary: The hero can temporarily pick up unfamiliar skills.

effects.details: After observing or studying, the hero can gain a temporary d4 in a relevant skill, or d6 with a raise, until switching to a different subject.

entries.name: McGyver
entries.summary: The hero can improvise useful devices out of scrap.

effects.details: Create improvised weapons, explosives, tools, or similar devices from scraps.

notes: The device normally lasts until used or until the end of the encounter.
A critical failure means the right materials are not available this encounter.

entries.name: Mr. Fix It
entries.summary: The hero repairs things faster and more effectively.

effects.details: +2 to Repair rolls.
On a raise, halve the normal repair time.

entries.name: Scholar
entries.summary: The hero is an expert in one knowledge field.

effects.details: +2 to one chosen knowledge-style skill such as Academics, Battle, Occult, Science, or a similar Smarts-based setting skill.

notes: This Edge may be taken more than once for different skills.

entries.name: Soldier
entries.summary: The hero carries loads well and endures harsh conditions.

effects.details: Treat Strength as one die type higher for Encumbrance and Minimum Strength requirements.
Gain a free reroll on Vigor rolls to resist environmental Hazards.

notes: Stacks with Brawny.

entries.name: Thief
entries.summary: The hero excels at urban climbing, stealth, and thievery.

effects.details: +1 to Thievery rolls.
+1 to Athletics rolls made to climb in urban areas.
+1 to Stealth in urban environments.

entries.name: Woodsman
entries.summary: The hero thrives in the wild.

effects.details: +2 to Survival rolls.
+2 to Stealth in the wilds.

entries.name: Bolster
entries.summary: The hero can steady an ally after a Test.

effects.details: May remove Distracted or Vulnerable after a Test.

entries.name: Common Bond
entries.summary: The hero can freely pass Bennies to allies.

effects.details: The hero may freely give Bennies to others.

entries.name: Connections
entries.summary: The hero can call on contacts for help.

effects.details: Contacts can provide aid or other favors once per session.

entries.name: Humiliate
entries.summary: The hero can lean on Taunt more effectively.

effects.details: Gain a free reroll on Taunt rolls.

entries.name: Menacing
entries.summary: The hero turns a rough reputation into social pressure.

effects.details: +2 to Intimidation rolls.

entries.name: Provoke
entries.summary: The hero can draw enemy attention onto themself.

effects.details: A provoked foe suffers −2 to affect targets other than the character who provoked them.

notes: The effect lasts until a Joker is drawn, someone else provokes the target, or the encounter ends.
Stacks with Distracted but not with additional instances of Provoke.

entries.name: Rabble-Rouser
entries.summary: The hero can apply a social Test to a group at once.

effects.details: Affect all foes in a Medium Blast Template with an Intimidation or Taunt Test.

entries.name: Reliable
entries.summary: The hero supports allies dependably.

effects.details: Gain a free reroll on Support rolls.

entries.name: Retort
entries.summary: The hero turns social attacks back on the attacker.

effects.details: If the hero gets a raise when resisting Taunt or Intimidation, the foe becomes Distracted.

entries.name: Streetwise
entries.summary: The hero knows how to work criminal and shady circles.

effects.details: +2 to Intimidation or Persuasion rolls made to Network with shady or criminal elements.
+2 to Common Knowledge rolls about black markets, fencing, illegal weapons, and similar topics.

entries.name: Strong Willed
entries.summary: The hero resists mental and social pressure better.

effects.details: +2 to resist Smarts- or Spirit-based Tests.

entries.name: Iron Will
entries.summary: The hero’s mental resilience also applies against powers.

effects.details: Apply the Strong Willed bonus to resisting powers and negating their effects.

notes: Does not stack with Brave and does not apply to later rolls caused by powers, such as fear from a damaging effect.

entries.name: Work the Room
entries.summary: The hero can Support two allies at once through words or performance.

effects.details: Roll a second skill die when Supporting with Performance or Persuasion and apply it to another ally.

entries.name: Work the Crowd
entries.summary: The hero can Support three allies at once through words or performance.

effects.details: As Work the Room, but roll a third skill die and Support an additional ally.

entries.name: Beast Bond
entries.summary: The hero may spend Bennies on animals under their control.

effects.details: The hero may spend Bennies for animals under their control, including mounts, pets, and familiars.

entries.name: Beast Master
entries.summary: Animals like the hero, and one becomes a loyal companion.

effects.details: The hero gains a loyal animal companion, typically an Extra of Size 0 or smaller.

notes: Animals generally will not attack the hero unless attacked first or enraged.
If the pet is lost or killed, a replacement appears in 1d4 days.
This Edge may be taken multiple times for extra pets, trait improvements, bigger pets, or one pet becoming a Wild Card at Heroic Rank.

entries.name: Champion
entries.summary: The hero is chosen to battle supernatural evil or good.

effects.details: +2 damage against supernaturally evil creatures, or supernaturally good creatures if the champion serves an evil cause.

notes: Applies to area effect damage, ranged attacks, and powers as well as melee attacks.

entries.name: Chi
entries.summary: The hero gains a mystical combat point each fight.

effects.details: Gain 1 Chi Point at the start of each combat.

notes: A Chi Point can reroll a failed attack, force an enemy to reroll an attack against the hero, or add +d6 damage to an unarmed or Natural Weapon Fighting attack.
Unspent Chi is lost at the end of the encounter.

entries.name: Danger Sense
entries.summary: The hero senses trouble before it strikes.

effects.details: +2 to Notice when rolling for Surprise.

notes: With a raise on Surprise, the hero starts on Hold.
Outside formal Surprise, the hero usually gets a Notice roll to detect hazards or prevent The Drop.

entries.name: Healer
entries.summary: The hero is unusually good at healing of any kind.

effects.details: +2 to all Healing rolls, magical or otherwise.

entries.name: Liquid Courage
entries.summary: Alcohol empowers the hero before the crash hits.

effects.details: Vigor increases one die type for one hour after a stiff drink.
Ignore one level of Wound penalties while the effect lasts.
Agility, Smarts, and linked skills suffer −1 while the effect lasts.

notes: After the effect ends, the hero suffers one level of Fatigue for four hours.

entries.name: Scavenger
entries.summary: The hero can turn up something useful when it matters.

effects.details: Once per encounter, the hero may find or produce one useful needed item, ammunition, or small device.

notes: The GM decides what counts as an encounter and what item can reasonably be found.

entries.name: Followers
entries.summary: The hero attracts a small band of followers.

effects.details: The hero gains five followers.

entries.name: Professional
entries.summary: The hero pushes one Trait beyond the normal cap.

effects.details: Increase one chosen Trait and its maximum by one die type.

entries.name: Expert
entries.summary: The hero further advances the same mastered Trait.

effects.details: Increase the same Trait and its maximum by another die type.

entries.name: Master
entries.summary: The hero’s Wild Die improves for one mastered Trait.

effects.details: The character’s Wild Die becomes a d10 when using one chosen Trait.

entries.name: Sidekick
entries.summary: The hero gains a Wild Card companion.

effects.details: The hero gains a Wild Card sidekick.

entries.name: Tough as Nails
entries.summary: The hero can take more Wounds before going down.

effects.details: The hero can take four Wounds before becoming Incapacitated.

entries.name: Tougher than Nails
entries.summary: The hero can survive even more punishment.

effects.details: The hero can take five Wounds before becoming Incapacitated.

entries.name: Weapon Master
entries.summary: The hero reaches peerless mastery with melee weapons.

effects.details: +1 Parry.
The hero’s Fighting bonus damage die becomes d8.

entries.name: Master of Arms
entries.summary: The hero advances from weapon mastery into near perfection.

effects.details: Gain another +1 Parry.
The hero’s Fighting bonus damage die becomes d10.
